creator: ddavid@ican.net
text:
Size Mismatch for ports directory listing in ABOUT.TXT and LAYOUT.TXT
ABOUT.TXT shows ports being 50meg's
LAYOUT.TXT shows ports being 100meg's

Fix: 

Change LAYOUT.TXT to read approx. 50meg's. I beleive that is the new un-packed size now.
How-To-Repeat: Read ABOUT.TXT and LAYOUT.TXT :)
